findings.title: T3 fail セットが暗黙的
findings.rationale: 受け入れ基準 T3 の「git repo 外相当の fail 集合」がどの check 名を指すか明記されていない。git-repository / github-origin / github-token-present の 3 check が fail し config-file-exists は pass という前提と推定されるが、テスト実装者が自力で推定する必要がある。非ブロッキング。

findings.title: T2 のスコープ（複合 subcommand）が曖昧
findings.rationale: 要件 2 / T2 で「specrunner <sub> をコマンド表と突き合わせる」とあるが、specrunner job archive のような複合 subcommand パスを対象とするかが未明。現存問題はトップレベル ps のみなので実用上は問題ないが、範囲の明示があると実装が迷わない。非ブロッキング。

observations.title: git repo 存在 + origin 不在のケースで 2 箇所に同一誤 hint が重複
observations.rationale: lines 34-38 と lines 49-53 の両方に 'cd into a git repository before running specrunner.' が定義されている。修正時に両方を変更する必要がある。

toolResult.reason:
Wrote design.md, spec.md, and tasks.md under specrunner/changes/error-prescription-integrity/ on branch change/error-prescription-integrity-f9eb31a0.

Design covers all 9 acceptance criteria via 6 decisions (D1–D6): origin-absent prescription factory, fail-set-driven doctor next steps, hint command-existence tooth, XDG-aware config path via injected ctx.configPath, git-fetch auth-error wrapping, and doctor --help usage.

Key design-time discovery (documented prominently in design.md "発見した波及" + Risks): the T2 tooth over "全 hint", built honestly against COMMANDS, surfaces stale prescriptions beyond the named `ps` — 14 `specrunner managed setup` (renamed to `runtime setup`) and 1 `specrunner job list` (→ `job ls`) hint sites, all verified via `bun bin/specrunner.ts` (Unknown command) and existing removed-commands tests. These are the exact command-removal/hint drift the architect's tooth is meant to catch, so they're included as required fixes (T-02) with all sites enumerated. Non-hint stale refs (messages/logInfo/banners) are recorded as observations but explicitly kept out of scope. All fact-check assertions verified against the current tree.
